name_en: Graves of Three Generations of the Magistrate Nudeshima Family
description_en: A monument (historic site), the graves of three generations of a magistrate family. It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 1982-03-24. It is held in a private collection.

name_en: Ruins of the Akiyama Family Wholesaler of Yoshii Post Town
description_en: A monument (historic site), the ruins of a post-town wholesaler residence. It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 1982-03-24. It is held in a private collection.
A monument (historic site), a Kofun-period tunnel tomb (yokoana). It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 1985-03-25. It is held in a private collection.

name_romaji: Hiuchi kaji shoku Nakano Magosaburō ichizoku haka
name_en: Family Graves of the Fire-Striker Smith Nakano Magosaburo
description_en: A monument (historic site), the family graves of a fire-striker smith. It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 1987-08-20. It is held in a private collection.
A monument (historic site), castle ruins. It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 1987-08-20. It is held in a private collection.
A monument (historic site), an archaeological site. It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 1994-07-27. It is held in a private collection.
A monument (historic site), a grave monument. It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 1994-07-27. It is located at Gentaiji temple in Yoshii, Yoshii-machi.
A monument (historic site), a stone monument. It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 1998-01-21. It is held by Takasaki City in Kurokuma, Yoshii-machi.

A monument (historic site), a cluster of ancient burial mounds. It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 2001-11-22. It is held by Takasaki City and private owners in Jinbo, Yoshii-machi.
A monument (historic site), an ancient burial mound. It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 2016-02-10. It is held in a private collection.
A monument (historic site), an ancient burial mound. It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 2017-02-20. It is held by Takasaki City in Shimosano-machi.
A monument (historic site), an ancient burial mound. It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 2022-01-18. It is held by Takasaki City in Shibasaki-machi.

A monument (historic site), a subgroup of an ancient burial mound cluster. It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 2023-08-01. It is located at Ninsoji temple and other sites in Jinbo, Yoshii-machi and elsewhere.
A monument (historic site), an ancient burial mound. It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 2023-08-01. It is held in a private collection.
A monument (historic site), a wind cave (fuketsu). It is municipally designated as a Historic Site of Takasaki City, designated on 2024-09-20. It is held in a private collection.

name_en: Tsuzura Rock and Kurakake Rock of Haruna Shrine
description_en: A monument (place of scenic beauty), notable rock formations. It is municipally designated as a Place of Scenic Beauty of Takasaki City, designated on 1990-04-09. It is located at Haruna Shrine in Harunako-machi.

name_romaji: Tsubaki na Jinja no ō-ichō, ō-keyaki
name_en: Great Ginkgo and Great Zelkova of Tsubakina Shrine
description_en: A monument (natural monument), a great ginkgo and zelkova tree. It is municipally designated as a Natural Monument of Takasaki City, designated on 1982-04-01. It is located at Tsubakina Shrine in Gonda, Kurabuchi-machi.

A monument (natural monument), a beech forest. It is municipally designated as a Natural Monument of Takasaki City, designated on 2005-07-27. It is located at Sengen Shrine in Kawaura, Kurabuchi-machi.

A monument (natural monument), a great cedar tree. It is municipally designated as a Natural Monument of Takasaki City, designated on 2005-07-27. It is located at Toharuna Shrine in Sannokura, Kurabuchi-machi.

name_romaji: Kyū Iwahi Shōgakkō kōtei no yurinoki
name_en: Tulip Tree in the Former Iwahi Elementary School Grounds
description_en: A monument (natural monument), a tulip tree. It is municipally designated as a Natural Monument of Takasaki City, designated on 2005-12-22. It is held by Takasaki City in Iwahi, Kurabuchi-machi.

A monument (natural monument), a cherry tree. It is municipally designated as a Natural Monument of Takasaki City, designated on 1973-07-31. It is held by the Honda Kami and Shimo districts in Kashiwagizawa, Misato-machi.
A monument (natural monument), a great ginkgo tree. It is municipally designated as a Natural Monument of Takasaki City, designated on 1980-01-10. It is located at Josenji temple in Shinmachi.
A monument (natural monument), a great mulberry tree. It is municipally designated as a Natural Monument of Takasaki City, designated on 1982-04-01. It is held in a private collection.
A monument (natural monument), a wild pear tree. It is municipally designated as a Natural Monument of Takasaki City, designated on 1982-04-01. It is held by Takasaki City in Nakamurota-machi.

name_romaji: Iōji ato no kusu no ki
name_en: Camphor Tree of the Ioji Temple Ruins
description_en: A monument (natural monument), a camphor tree. It is municipally designated as a Natural Monument of Takasaki City, designated on 1982-04-01. It is held by Takasaki City in Nakamurota-machi.
A monument (natural monument), rock dikes (ganmyaku). It is municipally designated as a Natural Monument of Takasaki City, designated on 1988-05-16. It is located at Haruna Shrine in Harunako-machi.

A monument (natural monument), the natural habitat of the Kiyosumi kokeshinobu fern. It is municipally designated as a Natural Monument of Takasaki City, designated on 1990-04-09. It is located at Haruna Shrine in Harunako-machi.

A monument (natural monument), a solitary sawtooth oak tree. It is municipally designated as a Natural Monument of Takasaki City, designated on 1988-05-16. It is held by Takasaki City in Nakamurota-machi.

A monument (natural monument), a natural grove of hinoki cypress. It is municipally designated as a Natural Monument of Takasaki City, designated on 1988-05-16. It is located at Haruna Shrine in Harunasan-machi.

A monument (natural monument), a Japanese nutmeg (kaya) tree. It is municipally designated as a Natural Monument of Takasaki City, designated on 1977-03-24. It is located at Horinji temple in Yoshiikawa, Yoshii-machi.

A monument (natural monument), a muku (Aphananthe) tree. It is municipally designated as a Natural Monument of Takasaki City, designated on 1977-03-24. It is located at Ninsoji temple in Jinbo, Yoshii-machi.
A monument (natural monument), a wild pear tree. It is municipally designated as a Natural Monument of Takasaki City, designated on 1979-08-21. It is held in a private collection.
A monument (natural monument), a weeping cherry tree. It is municipally designated as a Natural Monument of Takasaki City, designated on 1992-10-23. It is held in a private collection.
A monument (historic site), an old castle site. It is town-designated as a Historic Site of Ora Town. It is located within the Uzura-shinden area.

name_en: Matsumoto Tumulus Cluster, Tumuli Nos. 3, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13 and 20
description_en: A monument (historic site), a group of tumuli within a burial mound cluster. It is town-designated as a Historic Site of Ora Town. It is located in the Matsumoto area of Ishiuchi.
A tangible cultural property, a collection of old documents (komonjo). It is town-designated as an Important Cultural Property of Ora Town. It is held by the Board of Education.
A tangible cultural property, excavated archaeological artifacts. It is town-designated as an Important Cultural Property of Ora Town. It is held by the Board of Education.

name_en: Stone Stupa Tablet Excavated near Komyoji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone object (a stone stupa tablet, itabi). It is town-designated as an Important Cultural Property of Ora Town. It is held by the Board of Education.

name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Gyonin Mound (Khakkhara Staff and Old Coins)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, excavated archaeological artifacts including a khakkhara staff and old coins. It is town-designated as an Important Cultural Property of Ora Town. It is held by the Board of Education.

name_romaji: Kyōhō nijūichi-nen mei gyōnin hyakunenki sekihi
name_en: Gyonin Centennial Memorial Stone Monument Inscribed with the Kyoho 21 Date
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone object (a memorial stone monument). It is town-designated as an Important Cultural Property of Ora Town. It is held by the Board of Education.
